headline: Equal-Weight Strategy RSP Could Outrun SPY if This Macro Shift Continues
summary: RSP is beating SPY for the first time in years, but two specific signals will determine whether equal-weight strategies keep their edge or surrender it back to the mega-caps before year end.

raw.headline: Equal-Weight Strategy RSP Could Outrun SPY if This Macro Shift Continues

headline: ASML, Snowflake Lead Five Stocks Near Buy Points In Tough Market
summary: Chip gear giant ASML resisted last week's AI rout. But investors should also look beyond stocks tied to the artificial intelligence buildout
